title: A Flight Aboard an Electric Plane

segments.title: A New Kind of Flight
segments.audioText: A new all-electric plane taking to the skies could change how people and packages fly across the country.
segments.transcript: A new all-electric plane taking to the skies could change how people and packages fly across the country.
segments.translationZh: 一架新嘅全電動飛機升空，可能會改變人同包裹喺全國各地飛行同運送嘅方式。

points.label: all-electric plane
points.explanationZh: all-electric 即完全用電；聽到 all 同 electric 連住，意思係唔靠傳統燃油。

points.label: taking to the skies
points.explanationZh: 新聞常用 take to the skies 表示飛上天空，可以當成一個畫面去記。

points.label: people and packages
points.explanationZh: people and packages 一對一對咁聽：乘客同貨件，講交通用途。

segments.title: A Firsthand Look
segments.audioText: ABC News transportation correspondent Gio Benitez got a bird's eye view aboard the battery-powered aircraft.
segments.transcript: ABC News transportation correspondent Gio Benitez got a bird's eye view aboard the battery-powered aircraft.
segments.translationZh: ABC News 交通記者 Gio Benitez 乘坐呢架電池驅動嘅飛機，親身由高空角度睇清楚。

points.label: transportation correspondent
points.explanationZh: correspondent 係記者；transportation correspondent 即專門報道交通嘅記者。

points.label: a bird's eye view
points.explanationZh: 字面係鳥瞰，日常都可指高處或整體角度。

points.label: battery-powered aircraft
points.explanationZh: powered 前面加 battery，表示由電池提供動力。

segments.title: Charging and Takeoff
segments.audioText: The electric plane can charge in about 50 minutes and can be airborne in just 15 seconds.
segments.transcript: The electric plane can charge in about 50 minutes and can be airborne in just 15 seconds.
segments.translationZh: 呢架電動飛機大約 50 分鐘可以充好電，而且只需 15 秒就可以升空。

points.label: can charge in about 50 minutes
points.explanationZh: in about 50 minutes 指完成充電所需時間；about 令數字自然啲。

points.label: can be airborne
points.explanationZh: airborne 即已經離地、喺空中；be airborne 係常見航空講法。

points.label: in just 15 seconds
points.explanationZh: just 強調時間好短，聽落有『只係』嘅感覺。

segments.title: A Longer Range
segments.audioText: According to Beta Technologies, the aircraft can travel more than 300 miles on a single charge.
segments.transcript: According to Beta Technologies, the aircraft can travel more than 300 miles on a single charge.
segments.translationZh: 根據 Beta Technologies，呢架飛機一次充電可以飛超過 300 英里。

points.label: According to
points.explanationZh: 新聞常用 according to 交代資料來源，聽到之後通常會有公司、官員或研究名。

points.label: more than 300 miles
points.explanationZh: more than 係超過；數字前後可以稍停，方便聽清楚。

points.label: on a single charge
points.explanationZh: single charge 即一次充電；講電動車、手機、電池都好常用。

segments.title: Final Tests Ahead
segments.audioText: People will begin seeing the aircraft pop up across the country for final tests this September.
segments.transcript: People will begin seeing the aircraft pop up across the country for final tests this September.
segments.translationZh: 到今年九月，大家會開始喺全國各地見到呢款飛機出現，進行最後測試。

points.label: will begin seeing
points.explanationZh: will begin seeing 表示『將會開始見到』，係報道未來安排嘅常見句式。

points.label: pop up
points.explanationZh: pop up 係突然／陸續出現，口語感強過 appear。

points.label: for final tests
points.explanationZh: for final tests 交代目的：出現係為咗做最後測試。

sentences: A new all-electric plane taking to the skies could change how people and packages fly across the country.
ABC News transportation correspondent Gio Benitez got a bird's eye view aboard the battery-powered aircraft.
The electric plane can charge in about 50 minutes and can be airborne in just 15 seconds.
According to Beta Technologies, the aircraft can travel more than 300 miles on a single charge.
People will begin seeing the aircraft pop up across the country for final tests this September.

vocabulary.example: The company is testing a new electric plane.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢間公司正測試一架新嘅電動飛機。

vocabulary.example: The aircraft can travel more than 300 miles.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢架飛機可以飛超過 300 英里。

vocabulary.example: It can fly far on a single charge.
vocabulary.translationZh: 佢一次充電可以飛好遠。

vocabulary.example: The plane can be airborne in seconds.
vocabulary.translationZh: 架飛機幾秒內就可以升空。

vocabulary.example: As the plane descends, it can recover energy.
vocabulary.translationZh: 飛機下降時，可以回收能量。

vocabulary.example: The aircraft still needs FAA certification.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢架飛機仍然需要 FAA 認證。

vocabulary.example: Electric aircraft could transform regional travel.
vocabulary.translationZh: 電動飛機可能會改變區域交通。

phrases.example: A new all-electric plane is taking to the skies.
The reporter got a bird's eye view aboard the aircraft.
The aircraft can travel more than 300 miles on a single charge.
People will see the aircraft pop up across the country.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:00 跟讀第一句，留意 all-electric plane 同 taking to the skies 兩組詞。
重播 00:52，先寫低 can charge in about 50 minutes，再補返 can be airborne。
用 on a single charge 練替換：This phone can last two days on a single charge.
用兩句英文複述：The plane is battery-powered. It could make short flights cheaper and cleaner.

notes: 今日重點係聽科技交通新聞入面嘅數字同功能描述，例如 50 minutes、15 seconds、300 miles。
先用每個時間碼盲聽一次，再對照句子；數字聽唔清時，重播前後 5 秒就夠。
all-electric、battery-powered、single charge 都係講新能源交通好常見嘅 chunk。
dailyLifePractice 會配合交通主題，練問路、確認接送點同解釋交通延誤。

dailyLifePractice.title: Confirming a Pickup Spot
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你叫車或者朋友嚟接你，要自然咁確認上車位置。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Just to confirm, are you picking me up at arrivals or by the rideshare signs? I'm by Door 3 right now.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Just to confirm, are you picking me up at arrivals or by the rideshare signs?
lines.zh: 我想確認一下，你係到達大堂接我，定係 rideshare 指示牌嗰邊？

lines.speaker: Driver
lines.zh: 喺 rideshare 指示牌嗰邊。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Got it. I'm by Door 3 right now.
lines.zh: 明白。我而家喺 3 號門旁邊。

lines.speaker: Driver
lines.en: Perfect. I'll be there in two minutes.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Just to confirm 係好自然嘅確認開場，唔會聽落似質問。by Door 3 比 at Door 3 更口語，意思係喺門附近。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 Door 3 換成 Gate B、the coffee shop 或 baggage claim。
drills.example: I'm by baggage claim right now.

drills.label: Short response
drills.prompt: 對方講位置後，用 Got it 加你而家位置。
drills.example: Got it. I'm by the main entrance right now.

dailyLifePractice.title: Asking About Charging
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你借用朋友或辦公室嘅充電器，要問得自然同有禮貌。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Do you mind if I use this charger for a bit? My battery is almost dead. I only need about ten minutes.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Do you mind if I use this charger for a bit?
lines.zh: 你介唔介意我用一陣呢個充電器？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Thanks. My battery is almost dead.
lines.zh: 多謝。我部機差唔多冇電。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I only need about ten minutes.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: for a bit 係『一陣』，比 for a short time 更自然。My battery is almost dead 係美式日常講法，唔係真係死咗，只係快冇電。

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Do you mind if I use this charger for a bit? 三次，練語氣柔和。
drills.example: Do you mind if I use this charger for a bit?

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 I only need about... 講你需要幾耐。
drills.example: I only need about five minutes.

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a Travel Delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你因為交通或航班延誤，要簡短通知對方你會遲到。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: I'm running a little behind. My flight got delayed, but I'm on my way now. I should be there around six.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: My flight got delayed, but I'm on my way now.
lines.zh: 我班機延誤咗，不過我而家已經喺路上。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I should be there around six.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: I'm running a little behind 比 I'm late 柔和，適合提早通知人。I should be there around six 留有彈性，唔會講得太死。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 I'm running a little behind 開頭，換成 train、bus 或 meeting 延誤。
drills.example: I'm running a little behind. My train got delayed.

drills.label: Role-play
drills.prompt: 你講延誤原因，再用 I should be there around... 結尾。
drills.example: Traffic is heavier than I expected. I should be there around three-thirty.
